name: autosprint
description: AutoSprint — multi-agent feature development skill for Claude Code. Dispatches 5 specialized agents (Dev, QA, UI, Security, TPM) in iterative consensus rounds. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch, extended with multi-agent personas.

plugins.name: autosprint
